# Fathom + Google Drive

[Fathom + Google Drive integrations](https://zapier.com/apps/fathom/integrations/google-drive)

## Copy new Fathom transcripts to Google Drive files

Initiate a smooth and efficient workflow as soon as a new transcript comes in within the Fathom app. This automation will copy the file and seamlessly place it in your nominated Google Drive account, allowing easy access and storage of crucial data. Harness the convenience of this streamlined process to enhance document management and save valuable time.
